name: Bulbasaur
flavor: While it is young, it uses the nutrients that are stored in the seed on its back in order to grow.

name: Ivysaur
flavor: Exposure to sunlight adds to its strength. Sunlight also makes the bud on its back grow larger.

name: Venusaur ex
flavor: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

name: Charmander
flavor: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

name: Charmeleon
flavor: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

name: Charizard ex
flavor: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Squirtle
flavor: When it feels threatened, it draws its limbs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth.

name: Wartortle
flavor: It cleverly controls its furry ears and tail to maintain its balance while swimming.

name: Blastoise ex
flavor: Discard up to 2 Basic Water Energy cards from your hand. This attack does 140 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Caterpie
flavor: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: Metapod
flavor: Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can't withstand a harsh attack.

name: Butterfree
flavor: It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.

name: Weedle
flavor: Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.

name: Kakuna
flavor: While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.

name: Beedrill
flavor: May appear in a swarm. Flies at violent speeds, all the while stabbing with the toxic stinger on its rear.

name: Pidgey
flavor: It is docile and prefers to avoid conflict. If disturbed, however, it can ferociously strike back.

name: Pidgeotto
flavor: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Pidgeot
flavor: It spreads its gorgeous wings widely to intimidate enemies. It races through the skies at Mach-2 speed.

name: Rattata
flavor: This Pokémon is common but hazardous. Its sharp incisors can easily cut right through hard wood.

name: Raticate
flavor: Its whiskers are essential for maintaining its balance. No matter how friendly you are, it will get angry and bite you if you touch its whiskers.

name: Spearow
flavor: Due to its short wings, it can't fly long distances. It wanders about restlessly and pecks at bug Pokémon.

name: Fearow
flavor: Carrying food through Fearow's territory is dangerous. It will snatch the food away from you in a flash!

name: Ekans
flavor: The eggs of bird Pokémon are its favorite food. It swallows eggs whole, so sometimes an egg gets stuck, and Ekans faints.

name: Arbok ex
flavor: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Pikachu
flavor: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

name: Raichu
flavor: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

name: Sandshrew
flavor: It burrows into the ground to create its nest. If hard stones impede its tunneling, it uses its sharp claws to shatter them and then carries on digging.

name: Sandslash
flavor: It climbs trees by hooking on with its sharp claws. Sandslash shares the berries it gathers, dropping them down to Sandshrew waiting below the tree.

name: Nidoran ♀
flavor: It uses its hard incisor teeth to crush and eat berries. The tip of a female Nidoran's horn is a bit more rounded than the tip of a male's horn.

name: Nidorina
flavor: If the group is threatened, these Pokémon will band together to assault enemies with a chorus of ultrasonic waves.

name: Nidoqueen
flavor: It pacifies offspring by placing them in the gaps between the spines on its back. The spines will never secrete poison while young are present.

name: Nidoran ♂
flavor: Small but brave, this Pokémon will hold its ground and even risk its life in battle to protect the female it's friendly with.

name: Nidorino
flavor: It's nervous and quick to act aggressively. The potency of its poison increases along with the level of adrenaline present in its body.

name: Nidoking
flavor: Nidoking prides itself on its strength. It's forceful and spirited in battle, making use of its thick tail and diamond-crushing horn.

name: Clefairy
flavor: Its adorable behavior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute Pokémon is rarely found.

name: Clefable
flavor: Their ears are sensitive enough to hear a pin drop from over a mile away, so they're usually found in quiet places.

name: Vulpix
flavor: As each tail grows, its fur becomes more lustrous. When held, it feels slightly warm.

name: Ninetales ex
flavor: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Jigglypuff
flavor: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff ex
flavor: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

name: Zubat
flavor: Zubat live in caves, down where the sun's light won't reach. In the morning, they gather together to keep each other warm as they sleep.

name: Golbat
flavor: Its feet are tiny, but this Pokémon walks skillfully. It sneaks up on sleeping prey before sinking in its fangs and slurping up blood.

name: Oddish
flavor: During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bathing in moonlight.

name: Gloom
flavor: What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings stubbornly if touched.

name: Vileplume
flavor: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Paras
flavor: The mushrooms, known as tochukaso, are controlling the bug. Even if the bug bugs the mushrooms, they tell it to bug off.

name: Parasect
flavor: The bug is mostly dead, with the mushroom on its back having become the main body. If the mushroom comes off, the bug stops moving.

name: Venonat
flavor: Poison oozes from all over its body. It catches small bug Pokémon at night that are attracted by light.

name: Venomoth
flavor: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.

name: Diglett
flavor: It lives about one yard underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

name: Dugtrio
flavor: Its three heads bob separately up and down to loosen the soil nearby, making it easier for it to burrow.

name: Meowth
flavor: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

name: Persian
flavor: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: Psyduck
flavor: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

name: Golduck
flavor: When it swims at full speed using its long, webbed limbs, its forehead somehow begins to glow.

name: Mankey
flavor: It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.

name: Primeape
flavor: It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare.

name: Growlithe
flavor: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.

name: Arcanine
flavor: An ancient picture scroll shows that people were captivated by its movement as it ran through prairies.

name: Poliwag
flavor: In rivers with fast-flowing water, this Pokémon will cling to a rock by using its thick lips, which act like a suction cup.

name: Poliwhirl
flavor: This Pokémon's sweat is a slimy mucus. When captured, Poliwhirl can slither from its enemies' grasp and escape.

name: Poliwrath
flavor: Poliwrath is skilled at both swimming and martial arts. It uses its well-trained arms to dish out powerful punches.

name: Abra
flavor: Abra can teleport in its sleep. Apparently the more deeply Abra sleeps, the farther its teleportations go.

name: Kadabra
flavor: This Pokémon's telekinesis is immensely powerful. To prepare for evolution, Kadabra stores up psychic energy in the star on its forehead.

name: Alakazam ex
flavor: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Machop
flavor: Always brimming with power, it passes time by lifting boulders. Doing so makes it even stronger.

name: Machoke
flavor: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

name: Machamp
flavor: With four arms that react more quickly than it can think, it can execute many punches at once.

name: Bellsprout
flavor: Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.

name: Weepinbell
flavor: It spits out Poison Powder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of Acid.

name: Victreebel
flavor: Once ingested into this Pokémon's body, even the hardest object will melt into nothing.

name: Tentacool
flavor: This Pokémon is mostly made of water. A Tentacool out in the ocean is very hard to spot, because its body blends in with the sea.

name: Tentacruel
flavor: Its 80 tentacles can stretch and shrink freely. Tentacruel ensnares prey in a net of spread-out tentacles, delivering venomous stings to its catch.

name: Geodude
flavor: It uses both hands to climb precipitous cliffs. People who see it in action have been known to take up bouldering.

name: Graveler
flavor: It travels by rolling down cliffs. If it falls into a river, it will explode with its last gasp.

name: Golem ex
flavor: During your next turn, attacks used by this Pokémon do 120 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Ponyta
flavor: If you've been accepted by Ponyta, its burning mane is mysteriously no longer hot to the touch.

name: Rapidash
flavor: The fastest runner becomes the leader, and it decides the herd's pace and direction of travel.

name: Slowpoke
flavor: It is incredibly slow and dopey. It takes five seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: Slowbro
flavor: When a Slowpoke went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a Shellder. That made it evolve into Slowbro.

name: Magnemite
flavor: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Magneton
flavor: Three Magnemite are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Farfetch'd
flavor: They use a plant stalk as a weapon, but not all of them use it in the same way. Several distinct styles of stalk fighting have been observed.

name: Doduo
flavor: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

name: Dodrio
flavor: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

name: Seel
flavor: Thanks to its thick fat, cold seas don't bother it at all, but it gets tired pretty easily in warm waters.

name: Dewgong
flavor: It sunbathes on the beach after meals. The rise in its body temperature helps its digestion.

name: Grimer
flavor: Born from sludge, these Pokémon now gather in polluted places and increase the bacteria in their bodies.

name: Muk
flavor: It's thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: Shellder
flavor: It is encased in a shell that is harder than diamond. Inside, however, it is surprisingly tender.

name: Cloyster
flavor: Cloyster that live in seas with harsh tidal currents grow large, sharp spikes on their shells.

name: Gastly
flavor: It wraps its opponent in its gas-like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.

name: Haunter
flavor: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

name: Gengar
flavor: To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey's shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.

name: Onix
flavor: It rapidly bores through the ground at 50 mph by squirming and twisting its massive, rugged body.

name: Drowzee
flavor: It remembers every dream it eats. It rarely eats the dreams of adults because children's are much tastier.

name: Hypno
flavor: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves, such as Hypnosis and Confusion.

name: Krabby
flavor: If it senses danger approaching, it cloaks itself with bubbles from its mouth so it will look bigger.

name: Kingler
flavor: Its oversized claw is very powerful, but when it's not in battle, the claw just gets in the way.

name: Voltorb
flavor: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Electrode
flavor: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Exeggcute
flavor: These Pokémon get nervous when they're not in a group of six. The minute even one member of the group goes missing, Exeggcute become cowardly.

name: Exeggutor
flavor: When they work together, Exeggutor's three heads can put out powerful psychic energy. Cloudy days make this Pokémon sluggish.

name: Cubone
flavor: This Pokémon wears the skull of its deceased mother. Sometimes Cubone's dreams make it cry, but each tear Cubone sheds makes it stronger.

name: Marowak
flavor: When this Pokémon evolved, the skull of its mother fused to it. Marowak's temperament also turned vicious at the same time.

name: Hitmonlee
flavor: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

name: Hitmonchan
flavor: Its punches slice the air. However, it seems to need a short break after fighting for three minutes.

name: Lickitung
flavor: Bug Pokémon are Lickitung's main food source. This Pokémon paralyzes its prey with a lick from its long tongue, then swallows the prey whole.

name: Koffing
flavor: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

name: Weezing
flavor: Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small Koffing twins becoming conjoined as a Weezing.

name: Rhyhorn
flavor: It can remember only one thing at a time. Once it starts rushing, it forgets why it started.

name: Rhydon
flavor: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Chansey
flavor: This kindly Pokémon lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

name: Tangela
flavor: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon's true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Kangaskhan ex
flavor: Draw 3 cards.

name: Horsea
flavor: They swim with dance-like motions and cause whirlpools to form. Horsea compete to see which of them can generate the biggest whirlpool.

name: Seadra
flavor: Seadra's mouth is slender, but its suction power is strong. In an instant, Seadra can suck in food that's larger than the opening of its mouth.

name: Goldeen
flavor: Its dorsal and pectoral fins are strongly developed like muscles. It can swim at a speed of five knots.

name: Seaking
flavor: Using its horn, it bores holes in riverbed boulders, making nests to prevent its eggs from washing away.

name: Staryu
flavor: Fish Pokémon nibble at it, but Staryu isn't bothered. Its body regenerates quickly, even if part of it is completely torn off.

name: Starmie
flavor: Starmie swims by spinning its body at high speed. As this Pokémon cruises through the ocean, it absorbs tiny plankton.

name: Mr. Mime
flavor: It's known for its top-notch pantomime skills. It protects itself from all sorts of attacks by emitting auras from its fingers to create walls.

name: Scyther
flavor: It slashes through grass with its sharp scythes, moving too fast for the human eye to track.

name: Jynx ex
flavor: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, it is Knocked Out.

name: Electabuzz
flavor: With the coming of a storm, many of these Pokémon will gather under tall trees and sit there waiting for lightning to strike.

name: Magmar
flavor: These Pokémon's bodies are constantly burning. Magmar are feared as one of the causes behind fires.

name: Pinsir
flavor: This Pokémon clamps its pincers down on its prey and then either splits the prey in half or flings it away.

name: Tauros
flavor: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: Magikarp
flavor: An underpowered, pathetic Pokémon. It may jump high on rare occasions but never more than seven feet.

name: Gyarados
flavor: Once it appears, it goes on a rampage. It remains enraged until it demolishes everything around it.

name: Lapras
flavor: Crossing icy seas is no issue for this cold-resistant Pokémon. Its smooth skin is a little cool to the touch.

name: Ditto
flavor: Its transformation ability is perfect. However, if made to laugh, it can't maintain its disguise.

name: Eevee
flavor: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Vaporeon
flavor: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Jolteon
flavor: It concentrates the weak electric charges emitted by its cells and launches wicked lightning bolts.

name: Flareon
flavor: Inhaled air is carried to its flame sac, heated, and exhaled as fire that reaches over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Porygon
flavor: In recent years, this species has been very helpful in cyberspace. These Pokémon will go around checking to make sure no suspicious data exists.

name: Omanyte
flavor: This Pokémon is a member of an ancient, extinct species. Omanyte paddles through water with its 10 tentacles, looking like it's just drifting along.

name: Omastar
flavor: Omastar's sharp fangs could crush rock, but the Pokémon can attack only the prey that come within reach of its tentacles.

name: Kabuto
flavor: While some say this species has gone extinct, Kabuto sightings are apparently fairly common in some places.

name: Kabutops
flavor: The cause behind the extinction of this species is unknown. Kabutops were aggressive Pokémon that inhabited warm seas.

name: Aerodactyl
flavor: Aerodactyl's sawlike fangs can shred skin to tatters—even the skin of Steel-type Pokémon.

name: Snorlax
flavor: This Pokémon's stomach is so strong, even eating moldy or rotten food will not affect it.

name: Articuno
flavor: This Pokémon can control ice at will. Articuno is said to live in snowy mountains riddled with permafrost.

name: Zapdos ex
flavor: This attack also does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Moltres
flavor: There are stories of this Pokémon using its radiant, flame-cloaked wings to light up paths for those lost in the mountains.

name: Dratini
flavor: It sheds many layers of skin as it grows larger. During this process, it is protected by a rapid waterfall.

name: Dragonair
flavor: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

name: Dragonite
flavor: It is said that somewhere in the ocean lies an island where these gather. Only they live there.

name: Mewtwo
flavor: A Pokémon created by recombining Mew's genes. It's said to have the most savage heart among Pokémon.

name: Mew ex
flavor: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Bulbasaur
flavor: While it is young, it uses the nutrients that are stored in the seed on its back in order to grow.

name: Ivysaur
flavor: Exposure to sunlight adds to its strength. Sunlight also makes the bud on its back grow larger.

name: Charmander
flavor: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

name: Charmeleon
flavor: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

name: Squirtle
flavor: When it feels threatened, it draws its limbs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth.

name: Wartortle
flavor: It cleverly controls its furry ears and tail to maintain its balance while swimming.

name: Caterpie
flavor: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: Pikachu
flavor: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

name: Nidoking
flavor: Nidoking prides itself on its strength. It's forceful and spirited in battle, making use of its thick tail and diamond-crushing horn.

name: Psyduck
flavor: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

name: Poliwhirl
flavor: This Pokémon's sweat is a slimy mucus. When captured, Poliwhirl can slither from its enemies' grasp and escape.

name: Machoke
flavor: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

name: Tangela
flavor: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon's true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Mr. Mime
flavor: It's known for its top-notch pantomime skills. It protects itself from all sorts of attacks by emitting auras from its fingers to create walls.

name: Omanyte
flavor: This Pokémon is a member of an ancient, extinct species. Omanyte paddles through water with its 10 tentacles, looking like it's just drifting along.

name: Dragonair
flavor: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

name: Venusaur ex
flavor: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

name: Charizard ex
flavor: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Blastoise ex
flavor: Discard up to 2 Basic Water Energy cards from your hand. This attack does 140 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Arbok ex
flavor: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Ninetales ex
flavor: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Wigglytuff ex
flavor: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

name: Alakazam ex
flavor: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Golem ex
flavor: During your next turn, attacks used by this Pokémon do 120 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Kangaskhan ex
flavor: Draw 3 cards.

name: Jynx ex
flavor: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, it is Knocked Out.

name: Zapdos ex
flavor: This attack also does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Mew ex
flavor: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Venusaur ex
flavor: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

name: Charizard ex
flavor: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Blastoise ex
flavor: Discard up to 2 Basic Water Energy cards from your hand. This attack does 140 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Alakazam ex
flavor: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Zapdos ex
flavor: This attack also does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Mew ex
flavor: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Alakazam
flavor: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5000.

name: Blastoise
flavor: A brutal Pokémon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high-speed tackles.

name: Chansey
flavor: A rare and elusive Pokémon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to catch it.

name: Charizard
flavor: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to unintentionally cause forest fires.

name: Clefairy
flavor: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

name: Gyarados
flavor: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

name: Hitmonchan
flavor: While seeming to do nothing, it fires punches in lightning-fast volleys that are impossible to see.

name: Machamp
flavor: Using its amazing muscles, it throws powerful punches that can knock its victim clear over the horizon.

name: Magneton
flavor: Formed by several Magnemites linked together. It frequently appears when sunspots flare up.

name: Mewtwo
flavor: A scientist created this Pokémon after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Nidoking
flavor: Uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break its prey's bones.

name: Ninetales
flavor: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

name: Poliwrath
flavor: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breaststroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: Raichu
flavor: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Venusaur
flavor: This plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Zapdos
flavor: A legendary bird Pokémon said to appear from clouds while wielding enormous lightning bolts.

name: Beedrill
flavor: Flies at high speed and attacks using the large, venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

name: Dragonair
flavor: A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: Dugtrio
flavor: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Electabuzz
flavor: Normally found near power plants, it can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: Electrode
flavor: It stores electrical energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Pidgeotto
flavor: Very protective of its sprawling territory, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Arcanine
flavor: A Pokémon that has been long admired for its beauty. It runs gracefully, as if on wings.

name: Charmeleon
flavor: When it swings its burning tail, it raises the temperature to unbearably high levels.

name: Dewgong
flavor: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

name: Dratini
flavor: Long considered a mythical Pokémon until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: Farfetch'd
flavor: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. This sprig is used much like a metal sword.

name: Growlithe
flavor: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: Haunter
flavor: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

name: Ivysaur
flavor: When the bulb on its back grows large, the Pokémon seems to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Jynx
flavor: Merely by meditating, the Pokémon launches a powerful psychic energy attack.

name: Kadabra
flavor: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches even to those just nearby.

name: Kakuna
flavor: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

name: Machoke
flavor: Its muscular body is so powerful that it must wear a power-save belt to help regulate its motions.

name: Magikarp
flavor: In the distant past, it was stronger than its horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Magmar
flavor: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: Nidorino
flavor: An aggressive Pokémon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

name: Poliwhirl
flavor: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: Porygon
flavor: A Pokémon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Raticate
flavor: It uses its whiskers to maintain its balance. It seems to slow down if they are cut off.

name: Seel
flavor: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. This horn is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: Wartortle
flavor: Often hides in water to stalk unweary prey. When swimming quickly, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

name: Abra
flavor: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and teleport to safety.

name: Bulbasaur
flavor: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. Thus, a plant sprouted and now grows with this Pokémon.

name: Caterpie
flavor: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: Charmander
flavor: Obviously prefers hot places. If it gets caught in the rain, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Diglett
flavor: Lives about three feet underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: Doduo
flavor: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

name: Drowzee
flavor: Puts enemies to sleep, then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

name: Gastly
flavor: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokémon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

name: Koffing
flavor: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

name: Machop
flavor: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

name: Magnemite
flavor: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses attacks like Thunder Wave.

name: Metapod
flavor: It is vulnerable to attack because its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

name: Nidoran ♂
flavor: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger, more powerful of its horns secretes venom.

name: Onix
flavor: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, though colored black.

name: Pidgey
flavor: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pikachu
flavor: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can cause lightning storms.

name: Poliwag
flavor: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming over trying to stand.

name: Ponyta
flavor: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything flat in moments.

name: Rattata
flavor: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

name: Sandshrew
flavor: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: Squirtle
flavor: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

name: Starmie
flavor: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value this core as a gem.

name: Staryu
flavor: An enigmatic Pokémon that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

name: Tangela
flavor: Its whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. These vines shake as it walks.

name: Voltorb
flavor: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Monster Ball, it has zapped many people.

name: Vulpix
flavor: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. Its tail splits from the tip as it grows older.

name: Weedle
flavor: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp, venomous stinger on its head.
